bead.title: Phase 5: delete cli/internal/agent/routing.go (moved upstream as agent-1a486c2e ResolveRoute)
bead.description:
Delete the 915-line routing.go from DDx. All callers should be using service.ResolveRoute or service.RouteStatus by now.

Routing test file (routing_test.go, 915 lines) also deletes — its test cases ported to agent as part of agent-1a486c2e (mechanical newTestRunnerForRouting → newTestRoutingEngine rewrite).

Pre-condition: agent-1a486c2e (ResolveRoute) and agent-763ae08b (RouteStatus) landed; cmd/agent_route_status.go migrated (ddx-d224671d).
bead.acceptance:
- [ ] cli/internal/agent/routing.go and routing_test.go do not exist
- [ ] No remaining references to BuildCandidatePlans/RankCandidates/SelectBestCandidate/evaluateCandidate/NormalizeRouteRequest in DDx
- [ ] Tests pass (the routing test cases now run upstream)
